abstract.text: How to create services, change the configuration and important type aliases.
How to connect to viDoc and interact with the device on a low level.
The messages received from viDoc and related model types.
How to discover and connect to Ntrip mountpoints.
How to receive coordinate and accuracy data from viDoc.
How to access and communicate with the laser module in viDoc.
How to read the iOS device’s surroundings and combine with GPS information.
How to record single points with increased accuracy.
How to decipher where and why VigramSDK failed.

inlineContent.text: VigramSDK is a library to connect your app to viDoc to retrieve location data and perform laser distance recordings.

is distributed through CocoaPods and Swift Package Manager.
You can integrate VigramSDK into your app by using the following line in your
Use the optional RxSwift subspec only when your app needs RxSwift:
The default
installation exposes the Combine-compatible SDK API and does not pull RxSwift.

The root Swift package does not include the RxSwift bridge so applications that
do not use RxSwift do not resolve or download the
dependency.

abstract.text: The offset of different device components in relation to the antenna’s position for various devices.

NtripConnectionInformation combines all connection data needed to connect to an NTRIP server besides the necessary mountpoint.
Use a LaserService to start laser distance recording sessions with a given configuration.
SinglePointRecordingError are thrown, when due to the filtering phase of single point recordings there is not enough valid data to create a singlePoint.
Messages sent from the viDoc itself.
AverageComputable allows to specify a simple API to
calculate the average of an array of values that can be averaged.
NtripTaskError lists different errors that can be emitted by
implementations.
A high-level area of the SDK that emitted a support log event.
NtripService is used to search for NTRIP mountpoints for various NTRIP providers and create
instances to access NTRIP data.
A NtripTask requests RTK data over a NTRIP connection.

Controls how much support logging the SDK emits.
EnvironmentData contains all the available information from the user device and the viDoc device.
NMEAMessage is a protocol with all NMEA-0183 message types conforming to.
The severity of a support log event.
CoordinateCorrection specifies the correction of a raw antenna coordinate to the position that is observed in a given recording.
A GGAMessage is used for location data and correction information.
Changing rate of messages value
A BluetoothService is used to handle bluetooth connections.
SinglePointRecordingService can be used to record single points over a given duration.
During the recording phase, the service will keep track of all the environment’s data and then merge individual measurements to one combined single point.
The coordinate encoding format used in several NMEA-0183 messages.

to observe location data, location quality characteristics and accuracy information.

EnvironmentDataService can be used to observe or record all positioning and device motion information around the device.
